name: message-bubble

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with text, image, voice and reaction variants
changelog.1.0.1: Added better image captions for accessibility
changelog.1.0.2: Improved alt text to use caption when available
changelog.1.1.0: Added avatarUrl prop for image avatars with letter fallback
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Renamed avatar prop to avatarFallback for clarity
changelog.3.0.0: BREAKING: Renamed caption prop to content in ImageMessageBubble
changelog.3.0.1: Added aria-labels to reaction buttons and voice message controls for accessibility
changelog.3.0.4: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.3.0.5: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.3.0.6: Show demo data when rendered without props

title: Message Bubble
author: MNFST, Inc
description: Chat message bubbles with text, image, voice, and reaction variants.
